sections.paragraph:
Original: צמד

Transliteration: tsemed

Phonetic: tseh'-med

BDB Definition:

  1. couple, pair, team, yoke
    1. couple, pair, span (usually of animals)
    2. acre
      1. the amount of land a span of oxen could plow in one day

Origin: a yoke or team (ie pair)

TWOT entry: 1927a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
